CheckTitle: no セキュリティグループs allow 受信トラフィック from 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0 to Windows SQL Server ports 1433 or 1434.を確認します
Description: no セキュリティグループs allow 受信トラフィック from 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0 to Windows SQL Server ports 1433 or 1434.を確認します
Risk: If Security groups are not properly configured the attack surface is increased.

Recommendation.Text: Use a Zero Trust approach. Narrow 受信トラフィック traffic as much as possible. Consider north-south as well as east-west traffic.
